title: Book Appointment
subtitle: Schedule a consultation for your next tattoo or piercing.

toasts.successBody: We'll contact you shortly to confirm your reservation.
toasts.errorBody: Please try again or contact us directly.

modal.title: Book Appointment
modal.serviceQuestion: What would you like to book?

error.title: Something went wrong
error.submitFailed: Your request could not be sent. Please try again or contact us by telephone.
error.missingConfig: The booking system is currently unavailable. Please call us or contact us directly.
error.network: Your request could not reach the booking service. Please check your connection or disable blockers and try again.
error.timeout: The booking request took too long. Please try again or contact us directly.
error.invalidResponse: The booking service returned an invalid response. Please contact us directly.
error.submitRejected: The booking request was not accepted. Please review your details or contact us directly.

confirmation.title: Thank you!
confirmation.subtitle: Your booking request has been sent successfully.
confirmation.emailNote: We will contact you within 24 hours.

gdpr.consent: I agree to the processing of my data according to the privacy policy.*
